title: Subscriptions coming soon
subtitle: Free, Standard and Pro plans are ready. Paid activations will arrive in a future update.
launchInfo: At launch, this screen is informational only. Choosing a plan does not start a purchase or activate a paid subscription.

checkout.title: Plans in progress
checkout.subtitle: Compare Free, Standard and Pro plans. In-app purchases will arrive in a future update.
checkout.successMessage: Your plan will be activated after payment confirmation.
checkout.unavailableMessage: In-app purchases are not active in this version yet. Choosing a plan will not start payment or activate a subscription.
checkout.notice: This screen is informational only. In this version you cannot start a purchase or activate a paid plan.
